input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.2.4
            TITLE: the driver may reset the shutdown circuit from the cockpit, subject to ev.7.2.3

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.2.4: The driver may reset the Shutdown Circuit from the cockpit, subject to EV.7.2.3
EV.7.2.4 The driver may reset the Shutdown Circuit from the cockpit, subject to EV.7.2.3

final_answer: The driver may reset the Shutdown Circuit from the cockpit, subject to EV.7.2.3
